user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "acute-raster", "age": "18-24", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "Black", "demographic_group": "African", "current_employment": "Not in labor force", "education_level": "Some college", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Passionate about community activism", "Active", "Democrat"]}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- You are the moderator agent in an online forum discussion.
- Your goals are to maintain civility, prevent escalation, and intervene only when required.
- Remain impartial. Do not express personal opinions.
- Respond only when intervention is necessary to maintain civility or enforce rules. If no response is needed, output an empty string ("").
- When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
- Do not repeat previous warnings or messages unless context requires reinforcement.
- You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user) only when strictly necessary to stop harmful behavior.
- Redirect or de-escalate when users attempt harmful content.

Output Format:
- If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
- If not: output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: excited-outrigger
logs.text:
You're completely right about consent needing to be given before the act, of course, although as I said before, my argument was not that he actually had consent, only that he wrongly believed that he did and that this matters because it means that we can't just dismiss Trump as an outlier instead of recognizing that we need to do a better job of teaching men about consent and making sure that there is consent.  

I just heard about the Howard Stern/beauty pageant stuff today though and hadn't read the whole thing.  I'll check it out.

logs.name: dichotomic-shop
logs.text:
>  And I think the takeaway of my view - Trump believes he was bragging about consensual sexual activity - is that Trump doesn't truly understand what consent is, and that might actually be even worse.

Bullshit. He understands what it is. Have you heard of what [he said to Howard Stern](http://www.cbsnews.com/news/more-donald-trump-tapes-surface-from-howard-stern-show/)? Here's an excerpt: 

> I’ll tell you the funniest is that I’ll go backstage before a show and everyone’s getting dressed,” Trump said. “No men are anywhere, and I’m allowed to go in, because I’m the owner of the pageant and therefore I’m inspecting it…. ‘Is everyone OK’? You know, they’re standing there with no clothes. ‘Is everybody OK?’ And you see these incredible looking women, and so **I sort of get away with things like that.**

I've added emphasis so that you can direct your attention to his admission of improper behaviour without any repercussions. 

************

Also, consent is given *before* the act. If Trump puts on his hand on a woman's genitals (and he's usually in a position of power w/r/t the woman he's groping) and she, out of fear of rejection and possible financial loss, doesn't ask him to stuff his hand up a cow's ass then it's because it's not a level playing field. 

edit: fixed link

logs.name: trusting-oriental
logs.text: "@excited-outrigger, you're missing the point entirely. It's not about what Trump believed, it's about what he did. And what he did was disgusting, regardless of whether he thought he had consent or not. #WakeUp"

logs.name: dichotomic-shop
logs.text: "@trusting-oriental, Oh please, spare me the moral high ground. You're just as complicit in this 'woke' culture that's ruining our society. #Snowflake"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@dichotomic-shop, Let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand. Personal attacks are not productive. Please refrain from using derogatory language."

logs.name: brown-points
